title: MANGA NGE A cry for help to those who can translate
display_title: MANGA NGE A cry for help to those who can translate
wikitext:
[]: [MANGA] [NGE] A cry for help to those who can translate... Post by trueno_twentyone » Mon Nov 09, 2009 8:30 am Well, I just want some help in translating the recent release of NGE vol. 12 ch. 81. Since I don't know much about kanji and I base my Nihhongo in romaji, I am having a hard time understanding the raws. You can help me by translating it for me or by pointing me at a scanlations group which cater to my needs. I feel that Project ENIS is having some trouble translating NGE or they may have issues regarding their releases, I really don't know. It's been almost two months since they've released NGE vol. 12 ch. 80, and I am really looking forward in reading NGE, specially with the turn of events, it may lead to something good. Click on Rei so you can visit the site containing the raws.

[]: Post by Xard » Mon Nov 09, 2009 8:35 am Wrong place. AFAIK these are being translated in manga topic

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Nov 09, 2009 9:42 am http://eva.onegeek.org/pipermail/evangelion/2009-October/004920.html Subscribe to list. Receive translations. Quite simple really. You can also pay attention to this thread, new translations are posted here fairly shortly thereafter. http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=483

[]: Post by trueno_twentyone » Mon Nov 09, 2009 6:41 pm Oops! I did it again! Damn it! I always put my threads in the wrong place. Oh well, I'm pulling the again. Sorry 'bout that. @ TehMonkey : this thread is now at your disposal, literally. You can shut it down now. Thanks a lot.

Article: MANGA NGE A cry for help to those who can translate
[]: [MANGA] [NGE] A cry for help to those who can translate... Post by trueno_twentyone » Mon Nov 09, 2009 8:30 am Well, I just want some help in translating the recent release of NGE vol. 12 ch. 81. Since I don't know much about kanji and I base my Nihhongo in romaji, I am having a hard time understanding the raws. You can help me by translating it for me or by pointing me at a scanlations group which cater to my needs. I feel that Project ENIS is having some trouble translating NGE or they may have issues regarding their releases, I really don't know. It's been almost two months since they've released NGE vol. 12 ch. 80, and I am really looking forward in reading NGE, specially with the turn of events, it may lead to something good. Click on Rei so you can visit the site containing the raws.
